pullRequest.title: DOM-54734 Update FE domino-api version and stop passing in projectId when unnecessary

nodes.body: I think I missed that one got renamed. We're not concerned about that being a breaking change?
Only for codegen, I left the route itself the same
Just a heads up for checking. When this is merged back to develop, it will be needed to check the proper 5.11 domino-api version that is generated and update the dependencies.
